title: Bamboo Jungle Survival House
description: Adds a small bamboo jungle house, ideal for early game survival
body:
**Bamboo Jungle Survival House**

This mod adds a Bamboo Jungle Survival House to the game, perfect for starting out and staying safe during your first nights.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9883e220b264384ffe35b7f7e2aeeb8c1eb3f300.jpeg)



Inside, you’ll find useful loot and materials to help you on your adventure:

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/975d1b541c9b481c8da2c9f8fff520e937bee550.jpeg)

- The Bamboo Jungle Survival House can only spawn in the Bamboo Jungle biome.
- Chests feature custom loot tables, making the mod also compatible with the Lootr mod.


feel free to put it in your modpack!
